{{Quote|The 908th are traitors, and they will be killed – every last one of them.|[[Darth Maleval]]|<ref name="Legacy 4" />}}
The '''Battle of Borosk''' was fought between [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] forces loyal to [[Roan Fel]] and those loyal to the [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|New Empire]] under [[Darth Krayt]].

==History==
As a precursor to the main assault on the 908th's fortress, Lord [[Darth Maleval|Maleval]] and units of the 407th, including [[Joker Squad]], Company C, Battalion 9, captured and secured the gun emplacements along the perimeter wall of the 908th's HQ in heavy fighting.<ref name="Legacy 4" />

The next day, Joker Squad led the assault into the 908th's main fortress. Its defenses were breached around midday, and combat resorted to hand-to-hand in the tight corridors. The 908th's final resistance was centered in what used to be their main mess hall. Gun emplacements had been positioned by the 908th on the upper level walkways, and mines had been placed on the floor. Despite this, the 407th and [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] Maleval destroyed the remaining elements of the 908th to the last man.<ref name="Legacy 4" />

After the battle, [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] Maleval brought Lieutenant Gil Cassel's brother (a member of the 908th Division) to him and ordered him to kill him to prove his loyalty. Gil refused, and Maleval killed both of them as traitors. [[Hondo Karr]], one of the 407th's [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], attacked Maleval with a [[Vibrosword/Legends|vibro-sword]] in retaliation. Maleval used his [[Shock whip|electro-whip]] to attack Karr, but before Karr could be killed, [[Anson Trask]] shot the Sith Lord in the back, killing him. The event covered up in the unit's official report to its superiors.<ref name="Legacy 4" />

Following the battle, the control of Borosk and its [[Borosk system/Legends|system]] would go back and forth between Fel and the Sith Empire. In [[138 ABY]], however, the Sith would retake control of the planet in [[Battle of Borosk (138 ABY)|another battle]].<ref name="War">[[Legacy — War 2|''Legacy — War'' 2]]</ref>
